description_long: This object consists of a dense arrangement of green, heart-shaped leaves attached to thin, winding brown stems, forming a sprawling, organic pattern. The leaves are distributed evenly along the stems, with some overlapping and others spaced apart, creating a natural, cascading effect. The stems twist and curl in various directions, giving the plant a lively, dynamic appearance. There is no visible pot or container, and the plant appears to be a flat, wall-mounted or mat-like cluster of vines. The coloration is predominantly a rich, natural green for the leaves and a dark brown for the stems. The overall structure is thin and planar, suggesting it is designed to be placed against a surface or used as decorative greenery in urban environments.
description: A flat, sprawling cluster of green, heart-shaped leaves on winding brown stems, forming a dense, decorative vine mat. No visible pot or container is present.
description_view_0: A full, top-down view showing the dense arrangement of green leaves and curling brown stems in a flat, mat-like pattern.
description_view_1: A side view revealing the extreme thinness of the object, with leaves and stems barely visible from this angle.
description_view_2: Another top-down view, nearly identical to view 0, displaying the leafy, sprawling vine structure.
description_view_3: A second side view, again highlighting the object's very thin, planar profile.
attribute_plant_species: Pothos (Epipremnum aureum) or generic trailing vine
